title: Deepwoken Music (Reactive Music)
description: Transform your world into a medieval-ish rpg with these melodies! (Requires Reactive Music)
body:
**REQUIRES THE REACTIVE MUSIC MOD**

https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/reactive-music

 

Transform your minecraft world to a medieval ish sound pack perfect for rpg modpacks! 

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=bxbpLD_eyeE

 

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=zgQKTwbSzjE

 

 

**How to make it work?**

Use Mod Menu mod to switch between your song packs and switch to the Deepwoken one!


 

**Features:**

Main menu music

biome music

Boss music

Credits music

 

Apparently combat configuration is planned within reactive music mod so ill probably make an update for that.

So combat music is planned


Credits:

Naktigonis: Music maker (love his music please check him out)
